PushEvent:yasyf/captain-hook.summary: added file fixtures, typed-input conditions, and declarative rewrite actions

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-context.summary: added a ccx-guard pack that blocks raw grep and rewrites cat/sed/find to ccx

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-notes.summary: added a ccn alias and made the plugin auto-install the binary on first session

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-orchestrate.summary: added a /cco plugin and AgentProber liveness across the tmux, zellij, and superset backends

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-pool.summary: consumed fusekit's v0.5.1 proc layer and cleared holder carcasses on ChildDied

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-skills.summary: taught the repo-bootstrap skill to adopt cc-context (ccx) and documented the new plugins

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-squash.summary: adopted fusekit for the FUSE layer and restructured the build plan

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-transcript.summary: renamed the decisions ledger table and unified the code-correction ledger

PushEvent:yasyf/fusekit.summary: made the Supervisor/Policy consumer-agnostic with new spawn hooks

PushEvent:yasyf/homebrew-tap.summary: published the latest cask and formula bumps across the cc-* tools

PushEvent:yasyf/yclaw.summary: scoped the pf boot gate to hermes and added a filtering docker socket proxy

captain-hook@v3.14.0.summary: added file fixtures, typed-input conditions, and declarative rewrites

cc-pool@v0.31.9.summary: consumed fusekit's v0.5.1 proc layer and cleared holder carcasses on ChildDied

cc-transcript@v4.1.0.summary: renamed the decisions_v1 ledger table to decisions

slop-cop@v0.1.20.summary: added golangci-lint v2 lint and vuln jobs and cleared the lint debt

spawnllm@v0.3.1.summary: threaded cwd and timeout through the call() entrypoint
